name: TILE SHOP HOLDINGS, INC.
business: Tile Shop Holdings, Inc. is a specialty retailer of man-made and natural stone tiles, luxury vinyl tiles, setting and maintenance materials, and related accessories in the United States. The company sells primarily to homeowners and professionals. As of December 31, 2025, it operated 140 stores in 31 states and the District of Columbia.

exposures.sentence: Historically, we have monitored existing home sales trends as a leading indicator of demand in our industry, which remained challenged during 2025.
The majority of our tile products are sold under our proprietary Rush River and Fired Earth brand names.

Our website, TileShop.com, supplements our store experience and is designed for consumers to learn about our brand, our value propositions, and our product assortment, installation techniques and additional customer room gallery design inspiration.
We service our store locations from three distribution centers.

Cost increases from our suppliers as well as increases in tariffs paid to import tile products into the United States contributed to a 190 basis points decrease in our gross margin rate from 65.7% in 2024 to 63.8% in 2025.
